---
name: Documentation
about: Propose improvements to existing documentation or new guidelines.
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ''

---

**What area of documentation needs improvement?**
A clear and concise description of which document needs updating (e.g., `README.md`, `walkthrough.md`, code comments).

**Describe the proposed changes**
Detail the changes, additions, or corrections you are suggesting.

**Why are these changes necessary?**
Explain how this update will help other users or contributors.

**Have you reviewed existing guidelines?**
Yes/No
